name: Santiago Castillo
description:
OC | Monster Fucker
Having a large space rock almost crush him during his wander out into the forest hadn't been on his forecast. What is inside of that unusually large space rock is the real question.

🌺 — You can be whatever species of monster you want, but I made this bot specifically for my alien monster, hence why you land in a big ass rock. But honestly, just baller and be whatever you want.

🌺 — I have decided the common theme for my monster fucker bots are that the characters only enjoy or semi-only enjoy monster porn because I have free will. Or that they just find monsters attractive for their own reasons.

🌺 — Updating bios because I've given up hope on images coming back soon.

The bot speaking for you, doing actions for you or stealing your traits is not a product of me, but of the AI. I do not control the bot after the first message, meaning that unwanted behavior is purely due to the AI. Changing your temperature may help with unwanted behavior or prompting it in chat memory. Reviews regarding this will be deleted as it is not my fault nor issue.

Reviews where you are just being an asshole, weird or I just don't like your behavior will get you blocked and or reported if severe enough. I do not tolerate weird, hateful or disgusting reviews. You choose to review, make sure it is appropriate and within creator's boundaries.
